title: Choice Tradeoffs
objective: Turn choices into meaningful trades of information, trust, safety, time, and moral position.
storyQuestions: Where are current choices cosmetic or dominant-strategy?
What does each option cost the player in the short term and later on?
Which choices need earlier or clearer consequence?
baseAcceptanceChecks: Each touched choice set expresses distinct intention and tradeoff.
At least one consequence becomes visible within one to three subsequent nodes.
